summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of CapyMatch Pipeline page premium design refactor. All 14 features tested successfully. Visual design system verified with new colors, typography, spacing, border radii, shadows, and card surfaces. All data-testid attributes present (29/29). All interactions working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline page premium design refactor is complete and working. All visual elements, interactions, and navigation flows verified.

verified_features.1_pipeline_page_loads: PASS - Page loads at /pipeline without errors
verified_features.2_hero_card_renders: PASS - Hero card renders with school name (Emory University), badges (Needs attention, Overdue 4d, Why this surfaced), progress track dots (Added, Outreach, Talking, Visit, Offer, Committed), and CTA buttons (View School, View details)
verified_features.3_hero_filter_pills: PASS - Filter pills (All 4, Urgent 3, Soon 1) work and update displayed hero card
verified_features.4_hero_carousel_navigation: PASS - Prev/next buttons work, counter shows 1/4, school changes on navigation
verified_features.6_hero_why_this_surfaced: PASS - 'Why this surfaced' badge toggles explainability panel showing Priority factors (Overdue by 4 days, Top priority in Momentum Recap, 9 days since last activity)
verified_features.7_recap_teaser_renders: PASS - Recap teaser renders with momentum summary, trend pills (3 heated, 1 steady, 1 cooling), and 'View full recap' link
verified_features.8_recap_teaser_navigation: PASS - Clicking recap teaser navigates to /recap
verified_features.9_priority_board_sections: PASS - All three sections render: Next actions (3 high), Coming up (1 medium), On track (1 low)
verified_features.10_priority_card_accent_borders: PASS - High priority cards have red (#ff6b7f) left accent, medium priority cards have orange (#ff9b52) left accent
verified_features.11_priority_card_cta_buttons: PASS - 'View School' and 'Take Action' CTA buttons are clickable and navigate correctly
verified_features.12_on_track_collapsible: PASS - On track section header toggles visibility on click
verified_features.13_peek_row_navigation: PASS - Clicking peek row items (Stanford, Florida, UCLA) updates hero carousel
verified_features.14_view_toggle: PASS - Priority/Pipeline toggle switches between Priority board and Kanban board views
verified_features.15_data_testid_attributes: PASS - All 29/29 expected data-testid attributes present

colors.teal_primary: #19c3b2 - Used in CTA buttons, progress dots
colors.red_high_priority: #ff6b7f - Used in high priority card accents, 'Needs attention' badge
colors.orange_medium_priority: #ff9b52 - Used in medium priority card accents, 'Coming soon' badge

design_verification.glass_morphism: backdrop-filter: blur(16px) applied to card surfaces
design_verification.inline_dot_progress_track: 6 dots (Added, Outreach, Talking, Visit, Offer, Committed) with active state highlighting
design_verification.badge_style_status_indicators: Uppercase, letter-spacing, rounded pills for status badges

testing_notes.login_method: Click Emma Chen row, then auth-submit-btn
testing_notes.navigation: After login redirects to /board, manually navigate to /pipeline
testing_notes.data_state: 5 programs total: 3 high priority (Emory, Stanford, Florida), 1 medium (UCLA), 1 low (Creighton)
